---
title: "pressR saddle pressure report"
output: html_document
params:
  trial: NULL
  masks: NULL
  thresholds: NULL
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5)
library(pressR)
```

```{r}
trial <- params$trial
```

## Trial

```{r}
print(trial)
```

## Regional pressures

```{r}
masks <- if (is.null(params$masks)) pr_mask_saddle_6(trial$layout) else params$masks
pr_calc_regional(trial, masks)
```

## Composite report

```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
pr_plot_saddle_report(trial, thresholds = params$thresholds)
```

## Bridge detection

```{r}
pr_calc_saddle_bridge(trial, masks = masks)
```

## Slip analysis

```{r}
pr_calc_saddle_slip(trial)
```
